About Organization

Jharkhand Staff Selection Commission (JSSC) is a government organization responsible for conducting recruitment exams for various government posts in Jharkhand, India.

As per official notification, JSSC has released the notification for JILCCE Inter Level Recruitment 2026.


About the Programme

The JILCCE Inter Level Recruitment 2026 is a government job recruitment programme conducted by JSSC.

The programme aims to recruit eligible candidates for 326 Inter Level posts in various departments of the Jharkhand government.
